title: eulophia tabularis
intro: Eulophia tabularis is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa, known for its unique and attractive flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Eulophia tabularis include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are typically dried and ground into a powder, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
